chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 1078 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 26.01.2016 1. For Orders on Office Objection 2. For Katcha Peshi Mr. Liaquat Ali Sangrasi, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro Addl.A.G. The petitioner is seeking demarcation of his lands. His case is that although previously demarcation of his land has been carried out by the respondent No.7 but since the team which carried out the demarcation comprised of Mr. Gulzar Ali Khowaja, Assistant Mukhtiarkar who is relative of respondent No.9, a strong objection was raised by the petitioner but that was not considered and a favourable report to respondent was prepared. Learned A.A.G. states that if directions are issued to the respondents No.7 to carry out a fresh demarcation of the land of the petitioner according to law he will be having no objection. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with directions to the respondent Nos. 4 and 7 to carry out demarcation of the lands of petitioner afresh. This petition in the above terms stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE *Karar/-
